title: Core AI Benchmark Entry v2.0
description: Benchmark entry for Core AI models. Designed for JSONL append-only storage with full provenance.

device_class.description: Coarsened hardware class (e.g. 'A18 Pro', 'M4 Max'). Never raw device model.

verification_tier.description: Quorum-style trust ladder (spec §3.2): unverified (n=1) → community_verified (independent reproduction within tolerance) → hardware_attested (App Attest companion) / maintainer_verified; disputed during a flag/challenge window. Absent on legacy rows = unverified.

artifact_revision.description: Hugging Face commit hash the measured artifact was downloaded at (from artifacts.yaml huggingface.revision via the installer manifest). Names exactly which bytes were measured.

artifact_sha256_root.description: Digest root of the measured artifact: sha256 over the newline-joined, path-sorted '<sha256>  <path>' lines of artifacts.yaml huggingface.files. See docs/benchmark-protocol.md 'Artifact digest root'.

runner_version.description: Version of the coreai-bench-runner binary that produced this row (bench/CoreAIBenchRunner). Only set for extraction_method app_benchmark_protocol.

raw_trials_url.description: URL of the raw per-trial JSONL backing this summary row (e.g. a gist or release asset), so medians can be recomputed.

superseded_by.description: id of the newer benchmark entry that replaces this one. Append-only store: superseded rows are retained and marked, never overwritten (restores the field dropped by the YAML→JSONL migration).

device_verified.description: DeviceCheck JWT verified by relay. False for historical/CLI data.

model_verified.description: SHA256 of model matches catalog registry. Verified by relay.
